problem id: eb40d1f3
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(4) XOR SHR(6)) AND ROT(5)

examples:
  00100001 -> 00000000
  11000010 -> 00000000
  00100100 -> 00000000
  10001101 -> 10010000
  01111000 -> 00000001
  11110001 -> 00010010
  00001011 -> 00100000
  00110010 -> 00000000

query: 01011101
predicted answer: 10000001
